_readme: Roadmap-announced Standard sets that Scryfall has NOT cataloged yet.
Curated by hand from trusted announcements (magic.wizards.com first, then
reputable press). The pipeline drops an entry automatically once Scryfall
creates the set row (name match) or when its exact date has passed — so
stale entries never linger. Keep entries verifiable: every one needs a
sourceName + sourceUrl. confidence: official = WotC gave it (name/date);
reported = press/inferred from the announced schedule.
sortDate: ISO date when known, else YYYY-MM (lexicographic sort still works).

sets.name: Nauctis: The Sunken Realm
sets.notes: Magic's first undersea plane — merfolk, seals, homarids, and gods who command the currents, with two warring kingdoms pushing the realm toward the abyss. Opens the 2027 story arc.

sets.name: Universes Beyond (unannounced)
sets.notes: WotC confirmed three Universes Beyond sets for 2027, alternating with the Magic Multiverse sets; the IP is still under wraps. Press reporting places the first in April.

sets.name: Kamigawa: Titanbreach
sets.notes: An Omenpath opens above Towashi and drops a mass of Ikoria onto neon Kamigawa — next-generation mechs versus the behemoths of Ikoria.

sets.name: Universes Beyond (unannounced)
sets.notes: Second of the three confirmed 2027 Universes Beyond sets; the IP is still under wraps. Press reporting places it in August.

sets.name: Zhalfir
sets.notes: Zhalfir stands as its own plane for the first time — afrofantasy visual design honoring its storied past, with Teferi Akosa returning home.

sets.name: Universes Beyond (unannounced)
sets.notes: Third of the three confirmed 2027 Universes Beyond sets; the IP is still under wraps. Press reporting places it in November.
